title: dolichos longipes
intro: Dolichos longipes, also known as the climbing bean or horse gram, is a perennial legume plant native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate digestive issues and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. The plant's seeds, leaves, and roots have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and have been shown to have potential health benefits such as lowering cholesterol levels and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Dolichos longipes include decoctions, infusions, and powder extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
